citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:10 am on April
17, 2026. The inspector spoke to an individual at the facility who stated no one was available to complete the inspection.
An attempt to contact the licensee by phone was unsuccessful.
Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations.
Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
Additional Inspectors:
HARVEY KENT, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICEREnd Section
